g.text: Customer Churn Prediction — MNC Level Pipeline
Telecom / Bank / E-Commerce · Basics to Advanced ML + DL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Libraries import ke baare mein aur detail batao')
g.text: pandas, numpy, sklearn, xgboost, tensorflow, shap, imbalanced-learn

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Data loading aur EDA mein kya dhyaan rakhen?')
g.text: df.info(), df.describe(), df.shape — Patient ko pehle dekho!

g.onclick: sendPrompt('EDA mein kaunse plots banana chahiye?')
g.text: Churn rate, class imbalance, correlation heatmap, business insights

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Missing values kaise handle karein?')
g.text: Missing values (median), Label Encoding, One-Hot Encoding

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Feature engineering mein kaunse features banae?')
sendPrompt('Data leakage kya hota hai aur kaise bachein?')
g.text: stratify=y · StandardScaler fit() sirf train pe · Data leakage nahi!

g.onclick: sendPrompt('SMOTE kya hai aur kyun use karein?')
g.text: Synthetic samples banao minority class ke liye · Sirf train pe!

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Logistic Regression kab use karein?')
sendPrompt('Decision Tree kab use karein?')
sendPrompt('Random Forest kyun best hai?')
sendPrompt('XGBoost ke hyperparameters explain karo')
sendPrompt('Gradient Boosting aur XGBoost mein kya fark hai?')
sendPrompt('GridSearch vs RandomSearch vs Bayesian explain karo')
sendPrompt('Neural Network architecture explain karo for tabular data')
sendPrompt('Model comparison mein kaunse metrics dekhen?')
g.text: Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1, AUC-ROC — Sabko ek saath compare karo

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Threshold tuning ka business impact kya hota hai?')
g.text: 0.5 hamesha best nahi · Recall vs Precision business pe decide

g.onclick: sendPrompt('SHAP values kaise interpret karein?')
g.text: TreeExplainer · Force plots · Summary plots · Regulators ko explain karo

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Business impact calculation ka formula dikhao')
g.text: Step 13 · Business Impact — ROI Calculate karo
Revenue saved - Retention cost = Net Benefit
AUC=0.85 → Rs. X lakh savings — Management ko yahi dikhao!

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Model deployment ke liye FastAPI code dikhao')
sendPrompt('Production deployment architecture kya hoti hai MNC mein?')

g.text: EDA → FE → Baseline → Advanced → Explain → Business Value
